result.stderr:
sftemplate 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Levi Muriuki

  -c, --yamlConfig                Required. Config Yaml file location (Local |
                                  Url)

  -f, --variableFile              Variable definition file location (Local |
                                  Url).

  -s, --variableString            Variable definition string.

  -p, --armPrefix                 Prefix of generated arm files.

  -m, --master                    Name of the master template file.

  -v, --printVariables            Print loaded variables before generating arm
                                  templates.

  -o, --output                    Required. Output file location.

  -d, --includeManagedIdentity    Include managed identity resource in arm
                                  template.

  --help                          Display this help screen.

  --version                       Display version information.
